<var>
$DPS$ = "Overcharge / (Charge-Up + Cooldown + (Overcharge / Damage * Tick))"
$CE$ = "Total Price / DPS"
$TP$ = "$FNC-TOTALPRICE$"
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Tick
$FNC-COST$ = 7500; 2000; 6000; 9999; 27500; 60000;
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 4250; 750; 2000; 4500; 12000; 28500;
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 0; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = "Extra Juice"; "Second Energy Canister"; "Powerhouse Armor"; "Supercharger"; "Vessel Of Infinite Destruction"
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 11821094308; 11821094198; 11821093989; 11821093828; 11821093672
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Tick !! Charge-Up !! Cooldown !! Overcharge !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.208 || 6.5 || 2.5 || 9000 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.208 || 6.5 || 2.5 || 11250 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.208 || 6.5 || 2.5 || 18750 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 0.208 || 6.5 || 1 || 30000 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 50 || 0.158 || 5.5 || 1 || 50000 || 24 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 55 || 0.108 || 6.5 || 1 || 100000 || 26 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Tick !! Charge-Up !! Cooldown !! Overcharge !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.208 || 2.5 || 2 || 300 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.208 || 2.5 || 2 || 300 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.208 || 2.5 || 2 || 600 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 0.158 || 2.5 || 2 || 600 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 0.108 || 1.5 || 2 || 1280 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 90 || 0.108 || 1.5 || 2 || 2400 || 23 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</center>
</div>
</tabber></div>
